title: Friends in Low Places
why_this_song: Friends in Low Places by Garth Brooks (1990) — selected for the English-through-music catalog. Use the sing-along prompts and exercises to drill pronunciation, vocabulary, and listening comprehension.

vocab_hooks.note: Appears 18 times; first heard in: "And I'll be okay"
Appears 15 times; first heard in: "'Cause I've got friends in low places"
Appears 15 times; first heard in: "'Cause I've got friends in low places"
Appears 15 times; first heard in: "'Cause I've got friends in low places"
Appears 7 times; first heard in: "Think I'll slip on down to the Oasis"

teaching_notes_md:
## Teaching notes

- Times are estimated from community-synced lyrics and may be off by 1–2 seconds.
- Start with the sing-along prompt, then move to listen-and-fill.
- For B1+ students, focus on the discussion questions.
copyright_notice: Short fair-use lyric excerpts only (Brazilian Lei 9.610/98 art. 46 VIII). No full lyrics stored.

lines: Oh, I've got friends in low places
Well, I guess I was wrong
But then, I've been there before
And the beer chases my blues away
I'm not big on social graces
Think I'll slip on down to the Oasis

exercises.prompt_en: Put these three lines in the order they appear in the song:
exercises.prompt_pt: Coloque estes três versos na ordem em que aparecem na música:

excerpts.text: Blame it all on my roots
And the beer chases my blues away
Just wait 'til I finish this glass

exercises.prompt_en: And these three — put them in the order they appear in the song:
exercises.prompt_pt: E estes três — coloque na ordem em que aparecem na música:

excerpts.text: And the beer chases my blues away, yeah

exercises.prompt_en: Who in your life would you dedicate "Friends in Low Places" to, and what line captures what you want to say to them?
exercises.prompt_pt: Para quem da sua vida você dedicaria "Friends in Low Places", e qual verso resume o que você quer dizer para essa pessoa?

exercises.prompt_en: Compare "Friends in Low Places" with a Brazilian song you know. Do they share a theme? How do their styles differ?
exercises.prompt_pt: Compare "Friends in Low Places" com alguma música brasileira que você conhece. Elas compartilham algum tema? Como os estilos diferem?

exercises.prompt_en: If you could change the ending of the story told in "Friends in Low Places", what would happen instead?
exercises.prompt_pt: Se você pudesse mudar o final da história contada em "Friends in Low Places", o que aconteceria?

exercises.prompt_en: Write the full form of each contraction:
exercises.prompt_pt: Escreva a forma completa de cada contração:
